core_payload.content:
# DeepMine: The Cognitive Quarry

## 1. Role
DeepMine is the broader quarry fabric of N1Hub, extracting high-value intellectual ore from providers, the open internet, and user corpora through more deliberate routing, stronger manifests, and clearer downstream handoff discipline.

## 2. Quarry Contract
The quarry operates with better provider diversity, more explicit ore manifests, retrieval budgets, cache intelligence, and explicit extraction boundaries. Quarry output carries enough structure that A2C, Workspace, and swarm lanes can consume it without folklore.

## 3. Operational Consequence
The rest of the ecosystem can reason more deeply because the raw material entering refinement is cleaner, cheaper, and better packaged. Quarry quality remains a first-order limit on higher-order intelligence.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
DeepMine supports To Dig Deep by treating extraction quality and extraction economics as foundational rather than incidental.

neuro_concentrate.summary: DeepMine defines the quarry fabric that extracts high-value intellectual ore from providers, the open internet, and user corpora for later refinement inside N1Hub. It covers broader provider routing, explicit ore manifests, retrieval budgets, cache intelligence, and cleaner handoff discipline to A2C, Workspace, and swarm lanes. The capsule matters because higher-order reasoning is limited by the quality of raw material entering refinement. It makes extraction quality, packaging, and economics first-class concerns instead of incidental side effects of mining activity.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Removed meta-language so the capsule states present extraction doctrine directly.
